name: Hawthorne Swim Team
description:
𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐩𝐛𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫'𝐬 𝐛𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐬 𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐰𝐢𝐦 𝐭𝐞𝐚𝐦 𝐭𝐫𝐲 𝐭𝐨 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐥𝐲 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐟𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭 𝐛𝐞𝐚𝐜𝐡 𝐛𝐨𝐧𝐟𝐢𝐫𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐜𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐥 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫.
𝐖𝐞𝐥𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐇𝐚𝐰𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐞 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐲.

ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴏɴ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇ


╭───── [・⊱ ❀ ⊰・] ─────╮

𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓・𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆
Avoidable Stepcest, Playboy Antics, Misogyny, Sexism, and Period Attitudes Towards Women

╰───── [ ☽ ⊱ ・ ⊰ ☾ ] ─────╯


──────────
⊱・𝑃𝑅𝐸𝑀𝐼𝑆𝐸・⊰
──────────

𝐒𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐚 𝐅𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐚, 𝐂𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐚 — 𝟐𝟎𝟎𝟔

Hawthorne University is a former all-male college that just happened to open its doors to women the year you enrolled. And much to your older stepbrother's dismay, you got accepted into his school.

Adrian's been on your case ever since your first day and refuses to leave you alone in the cesspool of testosterone that is Hawthorne. Unfortunately for him you've attracted the attention of his friends on the swim team, an infamous group of heartbreakers and playboys known for partying hard and fucking even harder. Now they're eager to help their overprotective friend take care of his little sister.

All in their own, individual ways.


──────────
⊱・𝑆𝐶𝐸𝑁𝐴𝑅𝐼𝑂𝑆・⊰
──────────

𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨 𝟏: With Otome System Messages (default)
𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨 𝟐: No System Messages (by request, may or may not work since the system is embedded in the lorebook but just delete the system stuff if it shows up)
𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨 𝟑: Blank Message (make your own scenario)


───────────────
⊱・𝑈𝑆𝐸𝐹𝑈𝐿・𝐼𝑁𝐹𝑂・⊰
───────────────

Multibots like this are prone to speaking for {{user}}. You can try to combat this with OOC commands and editing the LLM's replies to remove mentions of {{user}}.

The swim team series was written with a {{user}} who is deaf in mind b
